channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: US-Iran peace talks in doubt as Trump signals no truce extension
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Trump remains ‘in a quandary’ despite Iran war ceasefire extension
- Trump Extends Cease-Fire, Even as Peace Talks Are Put on Hold
- Trump Extends Cease-Fire, Even as Peace Talks Are Put on Hold
- Why did Trump extend ceasefire when Iran doesn't even want to talk? US extends truce, keeps Iran blockade, tensions rise
- Trump Says He Won’t Extend Cease-Fire As Iran Peace Talks Up In Air
- Trump, Iran under the gun with ceasefire expiring: What to know
- Ceasefire crossroads: Trump warns of renewed war, Iran stands firm
- With ceasefire end approaching, this is where Iran-US 'peace talks' stand
- Uncertainty clouds Iran talks as ceasefire deadline nears
- What to know as ceasefire in the Iran war hangs in the balance
- Trump says US used ceasefire to ‘restock,’ warns he is ‘ready to go’ if Iran deal falls through
- Trump says he opposes extending Iran ceasefire amid talks uncertainty
- With the US-Iran ceasefire about to expire, could Trump put boots on the ground?
- Trump Says He Does Not Want to Extend Cease-Fire as Iran Insists It Will 'Not Negotiate Under Threat'
- Urgent: Trump says he expects "great deal" with Iran, unlikely to extend ceasefire
- Trump says he does not want to extend ceasefire with Iran, will get 'great deal'
- Trump on extended ceasefire with Iran: 'I don't want to do that'
- 'Iran has violated ceasefire': Donald Trump reiterates amid peace talks deadlock
- Live updates: Negotiations with Iran as fragile as expiring ceasefire
- Will Iran war resume tomorrow or will Trump extend deadline? Ceasefire clock ticking, what's known so far
- US-Iran ceasefire on brink of collapse as talks stall and Strait of Hormuz crisis deepens
- The Latest: Doubt surrounds Iran-US talks as ceasefire is set to expire
- Trump offers mixed signals on path ahead in US-Israel war with Iran]]>
